description: The One who has plenty of mercy for the believers and the blasphemers in this world and especially for the believers in the hereafter. His mercy encompasses all of creation.
The One who has plenty of mercy for the believers specifically in the hereafter. He singles out the believers with His mercy and rewards them with Paradise.
The One with the complete dominion over all creation, whose sovereignty is absolute and eternal. He owns everything and everyone without need of any partner.
The One who is free from every imperfection and far removed from every deficiency. He is pure and holy, transcending all that does not befit His majesty.
The One who is free from every defect and whose creation is free from any injustice. He is the giver of peace and security to His creation.
The One who witnessed for Himself that no one is God but Him, and who grants security and safety to His believing servants. He is the source of all true security.
The One who witnesses the saying and deeds of His creatures, overseeing and protecting all that exists. He is the guardian who watches over everything.
The One who prevails over all things and is never overcome. He is mighty and powerful, and none can resist His will or decree.
The One who repairs and restores the broken, and whose will is irresistible. He compels and subdues all things according to His infinite wisdom.
The One who is greater than everything and all attributes of greatness are His alone. He is far above any partner or equal in His supreme majesty.
The One who brings everything into existence from nothing according to His design and will. He creates all things and assigns to each its measure and destiny.
The One who creates all things and distinguishes one from another with their own unique characteristics. He originates creation free from any prior model.
The One who forms His creatures in whatever shapes He wills, giving each its particular form and image. He is the artist and shaper of all creation.
The One who forgives the sins of His servants repeatedly and abundantly. He veils the faults of His servants and forgives them time and again.
The One who has dominance over all things and subdues them completely. Nothing can resist His power or escape His overwhelming authority.
The One who gives without any return and grants His bounties freely to all. He bestows gifts generously without expecting compensation or reward.
The One who provides for all of creation, sustaining everything with the provisions they need. His sustenance encompasses both the material and the spiritual.
The One who opens the closed doors of mercy and provision for His servants. He is the judge between people and opens the way to all that is good.
The One whose knowledge encompasses everything, both the hidden and the manifest. Nothing in the heavens or earth or within the souls escapes His knowledge.
The One who withholds and constricts provision according to His wisdom and justice. He holds back what He wills from whom He wills with perfect wisdom.
The One who extends and expands provision to whom He wills with generosity. He spreads His bounty and mercy abundantly to those He chooses.
The One who lowers and humbles the arrogant and the oppressors. He brings down the tyrants and those who transgress His limits.
The One who raises up the believers and elevates the righteous in honor and status. He exalts whom He wills and grants them lofty ranks.
The One who grants honor and dignity to whom He wills among His servants. He gives glory and strength to the believers who follow His guidance.
The One who humiliates the disbelievers and those who disobey His commands. He brings disgrace and abasement upon those who are arrogant and unjust.
The One who hears all sounds and voices, both secret and public. Nothing escapes His hearing, whether spoken aloud or whispered within the heart.
The One who sees all things, the apparent and the hidden, the subtle and the manifest. His sight encompasses all of creation in every detail.
The One who judges and arbitrates between His creation with perfect justice. He is the final authority and His judgment cannot be overturned.
The One who is completely and perfectly just in all His decrees and actions. He never wrongs anyone even to the weight of a speck of dust.
The One who is kind and gentle to His servants, providing for their needs in ways they do not perceive. He is aware of the finest subtleties in all things.
The One who has full knowledge of the inner and hidden realities of all things. He is completely informed of all that was, is, and will be.
The One who delays punishing the sinners, giving them time to repent. His forbearance is perfect and He is never hasty in retribution.
The One deserving all attributes of greatness, magnificence, and grandeur. His greatness is absolute and beyond all human comprehension.
The One who forgives the sins of His servants, covering and concealing them. He forgives abundantly and His forgiveness has no limit.
The One who rewards His servants generously for their deeds, multiplying the reward manifold. He appreciates even the smallest acts of obedience and gratitude.
The One who is high above all things in His essence, attributes, and power. Nothing can be above Him and He surpasses all in every respect.
The One who is greater than everything else and the greatest in every sense. All things are small before His infinite greatness.
The One who protects all things from annihilation and keeps account of all deeds. He preserves His servants from harm and guards the records of all actions.
The One who provides nourishment and sustenance to all living things. He gives every creature exactly what it needs to survive and thrive.
The One who takes account of all the deeds of His servants and is sufficient to reckon with them. He is the perfect accountant who misses nothing.
The One who possesses all attributes of majesty, power, and greatness. He is the possessor of sublime glory and transcendent magnificence.
The One who is most generous and noble, giving abundantly without any reservation. His generosity knows no bounds and He gives to all who ask.
The One who watches over all things and is ever-watchful of all the deeds of His servants. Nothing escapes His sight and all actions are observed.
The One who answers the prayers and supplications of His servants. He responds to the call of every person who calls upon Him with sincerity.
The One whose knowledge, mercy, and provision are vast and all-encompassing. His generosity and forgiveness are boundless and reach all of creation.
The One who acts with perfect wisdom in all of His decrees and creation. He puts everything in its right place according to His all-encompassing wisdom.
The One who loves the believers and is loved by them in return. He is the source of all love and affection and draws the sincere hearts toward Him.
The One who is glorious in His essence, attributes, and actions. His glory is real and perfect, encompassing all dimensions of greatness.
The One who will resurrect His servants from the dead on the Day of Judgment. He brings the dead back to life to be held accountable for their deeds.
The One who witnesses all things at all times and in all places. He is present and witnessing all of creation without any absence or inattention.
The One who is truly existent and whose existence is the only absolute truth. He is the real, the certain, and the undeniable truth in all things.
The One who is relied upon and suffices as the one who manages all affairs. He takes care of those who entrust their matters to Him.
The One who possesses complete and perfect power over all things. His strength is absolute and nothing can weaken or diminish it.
The One who is firm and steadfast in His power, never becoming tired or weary. His strength is inexhaustible and His resolve is absolute.
The One who is the guardian and helper of the believers. He loves the righteous and takes them as His close friends and allies.
The One who deserves all praise and is truly praiseworthy in all of His actions. He is praised in all circumstances by all of creation.
The One who has counted and enumerated all things in their exact number. He keeps a precise record of every deed and every thing that exists.
The One who started the creation without any pre-existing example. He brought creation into being from nothing at the very beginning.
The One who will bring creation back to life after death. He returns things to their former state and will restore all beings on the Day of Judgment.
The One who brings the dead to life and gives life to all living beings. He alone has the power to grant life to whatever He wills.
The One who causes death and brings the lives of His creatures to an end. He alone determines the time and manner of death for every living thing.
The One who is alive and eternal, whose life has no beginning and no end. He is the source of all life and His life is perfect and absolute.
The One who exists by Himself independently and upon whom all creation depends. He is self-sustaining and holds all of existence in being.
The One who finds and gets whatever He wills without any difficulty. He is rich and self-sufficient, never in need of anything.
The One who is noble and generous in His essence and actions. He possesses honor and glory in the most perfect and complete sense.
The One who is unique and singular, without any partners or associates. His oneness is absolute and nothing shares in His divinity.
The One who is uniquely singular and indivisible, with no likeness to anything. He is the only one who is truly one in the absolute sense.
The One who all of creation depends upon for their needs, while He depends on none. He is the master who is needed by all and needs nothing Himself.
The One who has the complete power and ability to do whatever He wills. He is capable of all things and nothing is beyond His power.
The One who has complete control over all affairs and determines all outcomes. His power is all-encompassing and He executes His will perfectly.
The One who brings forward and prioritizes whom He wills. He advances some things and beings above others according to His perfect wisdom.
The One who delays and puts back whatever and whoever He wills. He postpones the punishment of some while granting opportunity for repentance.
The One whose existence has no beginning and who precedes all of creation. He is the first without there being anything before Him.
The One whose existence has no end and who remains after all creation ceases. He is the last without there being anything after Him.
The One who is apparent and evident through His signs, creation, and attributes. His existence and greatness are clear through all that He has created.
The One whose essence is hidden and beyond the perception of His creation. He is closer to all things than anything else yet remains imperceivable.
The One who governs and manages all of creation according to His wisdom. He is the supreme administrator of all affairs in the universe.
The One who is supremely exalted above any deficiency or likeness to creation. He transcends all that His creation can imagine or conceive of Him.
The One who is kind and good to His servants, doing them good and warding off evil from them. His goodness is boundless and extends to all creation.
The One who repeatedly accepts the repentance of His servants and forgives their sins. He turns back to His servants with mercy whenever they turn back to Him.
The One who victoriously prevails over His enemies and punishes those who persistently disobey. He takes vengeance from those who deserve it with perfect justice.
The One who pardons and erases the sins of His servants entirely. He forgives completely, removing all traces of the sin as if it never occurred.
The One who is full of compassion and kindness toward His servants. His compassion is intensely tender, caring for the well-being of all creation.
The One who possesses absolute ownership of all kingdoms and dominions. He gives sovereignty to whom He wills and takes it from whom He wills.
The One who possesses both perfect majesty and infinite generosity. He combines all attributes of grandeur with all attributes of noble benevolence.
The One who deals with absolute equity and fairness in all His judgments. He is just and fair in distributing and deciding among His creation.
The One who will gather all of creation together on the Day of Judgment. He brings together all that He wills in time and place according to His wisdom.
The One who is absolutely rich and free from all needs, depending on nothing. He is completely independent while all of creation is dependent on Him.
The One who enriches and makes self-sufficient whomever He wills from His servants. He grants wealth and sufficiency to whom He pleases.
The One who withholds and prevents what He wills out of His wisdom. He protects and prevents harm from reaching those who are under His care.
The One who is able to cause harm to whomever He wills and through whatever means He chooses. No harm can befall anyone except by His permission and decree.
The One who creates benefit and good for whomever He wills among His creation. All benefit in the world comes from Him and through His decree.
The One who is the light of the heavens and the earth, illuminating all of creation. He guides whom He wills to His light and is the source of all guidance.
The One who guides His servants to the truth and shows them the straight path. His guidance is the only guidance that truly leads to salvation and success.
The One who created creation in an unprecedented and unprecedented manner. He is the originator of all things with no prior example and no equal.
The One who will remain forever without end, never perishing or ceasing to exist. While all creation fades, He alone endures for all eternity.
The One who remains after all of creation has perished and inherits all that exists. Everything will ultimately return to Him when all earthly ownership ends.

meaning: The Guide to the Right Path
description: The One whose management and direction of all affairs is perfectly correct and righteous. He is the one who leads everything to its proper and intended conclusion.
The One who is patient and does not hasten to punish the disobedient before the appointed time. He delays and does not rush, giving His servants time and opportunity.
